title: Japanese Tofu Noodle Stir-Fry
description: Quick and easy Japanese-inspired stir-fry with noodles, crispy tofu, and vegetables.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the block of tofu and cook until golden brown on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the noodles to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce and 1 tablespoon of water.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the noodles and tofu, and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the noodles and tofu to a serving dish, and garnish with chopped green onions.
